old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-izi1","title":"[codereview-pass1] WiFi Kconfig for Heltec V3 uses generic CONFIG_WIFI=y but may miss espressif-specific ESP_WIFI_* options for STA mode on ESP32-S3 (legacy CONFIG_ESP32_WIFI_STA not defined in current HAL)","description":"lichen/apps/gateway/boards/heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_esp32s3_procpu.conf:77: CONFIG_WIFI=y / CONFIG_WIFI_NM=y ; check against drivers/wifi/esp32 and hal/espressif/components/esp_wifi/Kconfig for proper STA enablement.
